title: BONNIE L. HAYS SMALL ANIMAL SHELTER - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES BONNIE L. HAYS SMALL ANIMAL SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides care to stray animals, lost and found/pet services, spay/neuter awareness and education, community resources, and humane and safety education. 1901 SE 24th Avenue MS 53 Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Walk-in: Monday-Friday 11am-4pm Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 846-7041 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-7041 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Walk-in: Monday-Friday 11am-4pm Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus Line 57. Near Lowe's Home Improvement Store. Services: Animal Shelters Specialized Information and Referral * Pets Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - ANIMAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
